reason_for_decision: The rewritten article clears the pass threshold with a general architecture taxonomy, clearer revisit-driven logic, and much lower catalog noise.
strengths: The article has been upgraded from a catalog-style code table into a general knowledge-base comparison of scanning families.
Revisit behavior, hybrid trade-offs, and lifecycle burden are explained in operational terms.
The selection questions now make the piece useful even for readers who do not know the internal product taxonomy.
summary_assessment: This version is now strong enough to pass. It is materially better structured, more generalizable, and more editorially disciplined than the earlier draft.
